# provenance: GraphQL rate-limit exhaustion masked as an unrelated
# owner-resolution error by `gh project item-list`/`item-add`/`item-edit`.
# original live incident: 2026-07-08T03:05:00Z, task #68 (see
# .claude/feedbacks/feed.yaml, ts 2026-07-08T03:05:00Z, and issue #90's
# body) -- graphql remaining=0, board writes blocked ~15 minutes until the
# reset window; this exact text ("unknown owner type") is what gh printed
# instead of any rate-limit wording, which is why board-queue.sh's
# text-match fast path (_rate_limited) missed it and #90 had to add the
# `gh api rate_limit` probe fallback.
# cross-validated live during this task (#91), 2026-07-08T~11:35Z: running
# `gh project item-list 1 --owner this-owner-does-not-exist-zzz --format
# json` against the real, authenticated gh CLI (account: Zugruul) on this
# machine reproduced this exact byte-for-byte string on stderr, exit 1 --
# confirming it is gh's genuine wording (not a paraphrase) for owner-type
# resolution failures, of which GraphQL exhaustion is one trigger.
# account state at the original incident: graphql remaining=0 (per feed.yaml).
# account state at the cross-validation capture: graphql remaining=41/5000
# (NOT exhausted -- this repro used a bad --owner value, a different route
# to the same gh error string, not an actual rate-limit trigger).
# source: .claude/feedbacks/feed.yaml (ts 2026-07-08T03:05:00Z); issue #90;
# board-queue.sh:37 comment; live gh CLI invocation, this task.

unknown owner type
